hero.description: I build scalable software solutions with a focus on clean code and exceptional user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate developer with a keen eye for design and a drive for creating seamless digital experiences. With a strong foundation in modern web technologies, I transform complex requirements into elegant, user-friendly solutions.

bmsintel.title: BMS Intel
bmsintel.description: All-in-one building management platform that unifies critical systems for performance optimization and predictive analytics. Features real-time IoT monitoring, multi-building oversight, and end-to-end encryption.

citycommute.title: CityCommute
citycommute.description: High-fidelity agent-based urban mobility simulation engine. Features real-time visualization of multi-modal transport (cars, pedestrians, buses) using A* pathfinding and high-performance WebSockets. Provides deep analytics on traffic efficiency and agent behavior.

jobs.description: Contributed to system architecture, development, and deployment of a Building Management System (BMS) built with Next.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.
contributions: Designed RESTful APIs, database schemas, and WebSocket integration for real-time sensor data ingestion and device control.
Developed interactive dashboards with role-based access control for visualizing HVAC, lighting, and occupancy metrics.
Containerized the application using Docker and configured CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments.
Provided leadership, direction, and supervision to junior employees and teams.
Applied appropriate standards, processes, procedures, and tools throughout the system development life cycle to support technical engineering products.

jobs.description: Extracted and synthesized data from financial account statements to generate personalized PDF summary reports.
contributions: Extracted key data from invoices and presented it dynamically in the user interface using Django.
Implemented automated tests to ensure code quality and detect errors during deployment.
Updated the development environment setup to streamline onboarding for future developers.

schools.degree: B.S. in Computer Science and Technology

footer.title: Let's Connect
footer.description: Open for new opportunities. Let's build something amazing together.
